chapter_title.en: The Merits of the Ziyārah of the Believers and How it Should be Performed

text: حَدَّثَنَا بَعْضُ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ عَبَّاسِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ الْقَصَبَانِيِّ عَنْ يَقْطِينٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا رَبِيعُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْمُسْلِيُّ قَالَ كَانَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (ع) إِذَا دَخَلَ الْجَبَّانَةَ يَقُولُ- السَّلَامُ عَلَى أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 18. Muḥammad ibn Ḥasan ibn Walīd narrated to me from someone whose name he mentioned, from Aḥmad ibn Abī ‘Abdillāh Al-Barqi, from some of our companions, from ‘Abbās ibn ‘Āmir Al-Qasbāni, from Yaqťīn, from Rabī’ ibn Muḥammad Al-Musli, who said: When Abū ‘Abdillāh (Imam Sādiq (a.s.)) would enter a graveyard, he would say: Salām upon the people of Paradise.
